option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
# Node node_modules/
# Env files .env .env.*
# Logs npm-debug.log* yarn-debug.log* yarn-error.log* pnpm-debug.log*
# Build outputs FrontEnd/dist/ BackEnd/dist/
# Vite cache FrontEnd/.vite/
# OS .DS_Store Thumbs.db

option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
